content.text:
I'll help you get oriented with a warmup exploration of the codebase. Let me start by examining the current working directory structure to understand what we're working with.

```bash
ls -la /workspace
```

```bash
find /workspace -maxdepth 2 -type f -name "*.py" -o -name "*.js" -o -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.java" -o -name "*.go" -o -name "*.rs" -o -name "*.cpp" -o -name "*.c" -o -name "*.rb" -o -name "*.php" -o -name "*.swift" -o -name "*.kt" 2>/dev/null | head -20
```

```bash
find /workspace -maxdepth 3 -type f \( -name "README*" -o -name "package.json" -o -name "requirements.txt" -o -name "pom.xml" -o -name "Cargo.toml" -o -name "go.mod" -o -name "build.gradle" \) 2>/dev/null
```

Let me explore the directory structure more systematically:
